'''Sorsha''' was an individual from [[Andowyne]] and was the daughter of the Demon [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Bavmorda]] and the good [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Mikal Tanthalos]] of [[Tir Asleen]] whose fiery red hair she inherited.

Bavmorda raised the young princess as a warrior and Sorsha became a master archer and horseback rider. At a very young age she was knowledgeable enough in the art of war to command the Nockmaar army. However, when her battles brought her up against the valiant swordsman [[Madmartigan]] she became smitten with love, rejected her wicked past, and vowed to put an end to her mother's treachery. Once Bavmorda was defeated, she married Madmartigan and lived with him in her childhood home of Tir Asleen. One year after Bavmorda's downfall, Sorsha disappeared in the Cataclysm, along with the rest of Tir Asleen.<ref name="Databank" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
On [[April 1]], [[2006]], [[StarWars.com]] updated its [[Databank (original)|Databank]] with elements from the film and its spin-off novels, indicating that [[Willow (film)|''Willow'']] would be added to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' continuity. Elaborate databank entries were written which attempted to plausibly fit the film into the history of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe. However, two days later, it was revealed to be an [[Wikipedia:April Fools' Day|April Fools' joke]], and thus non-[[canon]].<ref name="DB-The Shadow War Chronicles">{{DB|updates|401/news20060401.html|The Shadow War Chronicles}} {{C|[https://web.archive.org/web/20080325023230/www.starwars.com/databank/updates/401/news20060401.html backup link] on [[Wikipedia:Internet Archive|Archive.org]]}}</ref>
